title: WOMEN'S TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM - 211info
text: LOVE INC NEWBERG WOMEN'S TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Christian faith-based transitional housing. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Single women age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 537-3999 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Carlton, Dayton, Dundee, Lafayette, Newberg, St. Paul, and Yamhill Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TRANSFORMATIONAL MINISTRY MATERIAL GOODS - GAP MINISTRIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC NEWBERG
